description: mailc places content directly in column td without per-component tr>td wrappers
reason: MJML wraps every component in tr>td with font-size:0px, padding, and word-break. mailc handles word-break at the column td level without per-component wrappers — significantly less HTML, same rendering.
mailcApproach:
text

directly in column td — no per-component wrapper

description:
mailc uses semantic

with margin:0 instead of MJML's

wrapper with injected font defaults
reason: MJML uses div because its own CSS reset breaks p elements. mailc uses p directly with margin:0 inline — semantically correct, no wrapper needed, less HTML output.
mailcApproach:
text

— semantically correct, no font-family/color defaults injected

description: mailc uses VML v:roundrect for Outlook buttons instead of MJML's table+bgcolor approach
reason: MJML uses a table wrapper with border-collapse:separate for border-radius, bgcolor for Outlook fallback, and mso-padding-alt. mailc uses VML v:roundrect giving pixel-perfect rounded buttons in Outlook without a table wrapper — better rendering, less HTML.

description: mailc uses cross-client span border-top for dividers instead of MJML's p+Outlook conditional table
reason: MJML uses p with border-top plus an Outlook conditional table because Outlook doesn't render borders on p reliably. mailc uses span with display:block and border-top inside a p — works cross-client without conditional comments.

description: Text content extraction order differs due to title and preview text DOM placement
reason: Both compilers include the same visible text. Difference is in DOM ordering of title and preview text elements — affects flat text extraction but not visual rendering.
mjmlApproach: <title>text</title> in head, preview text with zero-width space padding in body
mailcApproach: <title>text</title> in head, preview text in hidden div — same content, different extraction order

description: MJML button td uses bgcolor HTML attr; mailc VML v:roundrect handles Outlook colors natively
reason: The structurally detected 'bgcolor attr' diff is exclusively on button <td> elements. MJML uses bgcolor for Outlook color fallback on buttons. mailc uses VML v:roundrect which provides pixel-perfect rounded corners AND background colors in Outlook — the superior approach.
